global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on a call to action and branding.
global.main_message: Promoting hotel and flight bookings through the DriftPass app.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: A collection of abstract shapes in the center, featuring a large oval and a square with a light blue background.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: Another set of abstract shapes in the center, including smaller circles and a rectangle, all in a light blue color scheme.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A small circle located towards the bottom center, appearing as a decorative element.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: Another small circle positioned slightly above the previous one, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A prominent call to action at the bottom, featuring bold text that reads 'destinations await Hotels + flights in one tap $4.99 Shop now' in white against a blue background.
elements.text_content: destinations await Hotels + flights in one tap $4.99 Shop now

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: The logo 'DriftPass' displayed at the top in large, bold text, colored in white against a blue background.

elements.label: dream text
elements.description: The word 'Dream' in a medium-sized font, centered above the call to action, colored in white.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' located at the top left corner, serving as a decorative element.
